message:
test: add RU lesson component structural tests

Add 14 bun:test structural tests for ru-lesson.tsx covering:
- Component export validation
- Lesson registry (LESSONS array)
- Commands registry (COMMANDS array)
- Flywheel tools integration
- Workflow scenarios with RU steps
- Synergy explanations

All tests pass. Runtime behavior covered by Playwright E2E tests.

Closes bead 7qy0 - ACTUALLY implemented (not deferred).
